definition: Total player-possession duration during build-up phases.
computation: Sum duration for player_possession events where team_in_possession_phase_type is build_up.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more time spent in controlled buildup from deeper areas.

definition: Total player-possession duration during create phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is create.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more time spent constructing attacks in advanced attacking structure.

definition: Total player-possession duration during finish phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is finish.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more time spent close to goal or in final attacking actions.

definition: Total player-possession duration during quick-break phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is quick_break.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more counter-attacking or fast-break activity.

definition: Total player-possession duration during transition phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is transition.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more attacking activity immediately around changes of possession.

definition: Total player-possession duration during direct-play phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is direct.
interpretation: Higher value suggests faster, more vertical attacking phases.

definition: Total player-possession duration during set-play phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is set_play.
interpretation: Higher value suggests greater dead-ball attacking activity.

definition: Total player-possession duration during chaotic phases.
computation: Sum duration where phase type is chaotic.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more broken-play or unstable possession situations.

definition: Count of passes received or targeted in the attacking third.
computation: Count player_possession events ending with pass and target/reception third equal to attacking_third.
interpretation: Higher value suggests stronger ball progression into advanced territory.

definition: Count of forward passes into the attacking third.
computation: Count attacking-third passes where pass_direction is forward.
interpretation: Higher value suggests vertical progression through passes.

definition: Count of long passes into the attacking third.
computation: Count attacking-third passes where pass_range is long.
interpretation: Higher value suggests direct long-ball progression into advanced zones.

definition: Count of passes into central or half-space attacking-third areas.
computation: Count attacking-third passes ending in center or half-space channels.
interpretation: Higher value suggests central or half-space penetration.

definition: Count of passes into wide attacking-third areas.
computation: Count attacking-third passes ending in wide_left or wide_right channels.
interpretation: Higher value suggests flank-oriented progression.

definition: Attacking-third possession actions during minutes 0 to 15.
computation: Count player_possession events ending in attacking_third with minute_start in [0,15).
interpretation: Shows early territorial occupation.

definition: Attacking-third possession actions during minutes 15 to 30.
computation: Count player_possession events ending in attacking_third with minute_start in [15,30).
interpretation: Shows territorial occupation in the second match segment.

definition: Attacking-third possession actions during minutes 30 to 45.
computation: Count player_possession events ending in attacking_third with minute_start in [30,45).
interpretation: Shows territorial occupation late in the first half.

definition: Attacking-third possession actions during minutes 45 to 60.
computation: Count player_possession events ending in attacking_third with minute_start in [45,60).
interpretation: Shows territorial occupation after halftime.

definition: Attacking-third possession actions during minutes 60 to 75.
computation: Count player_possession events ending in attacking_third with minute_start in [60,75).
interpretation: Shows territorial occupation in the middle of the second half.

definition: Attacking-third possession actions from minute 75 onward.
computation: Count player_possession events ending in attacking_third with minute_start in [75,120).
interpretation: Shows late pressure, chase-state pressure, or closing territorial control.

definition: Count of one-touch player possessions.
computation: Count player_possession events where one_touch is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests faster circulation and quick ball release.

definition: Count of quick-pass player possessions.
computation: Count player_possession events where quick_pass is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests faster passing tempo.

definition: Count of carry player possessions.
computation: Count player_possession events where carry is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more ball-carrying and dribble-like progression.

definition: Count of possessions with forward momentum.
computation: Count player_possession events where forward_momentum is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more forward-oriented attacking motion.

definition: Count of high-speed-running player possessions.
computation: Count player_possession events where speed_avg_band is hsr.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more high-tempo ball-carrying or receiving actions.

definition: Count of sprinting player possessions.
computation: Count player_possession events where speed_avg_band is sprinting.
interpretation: Higher value suggests very fast attacking actions.

definition: Total duration of high-speed or sprinting possessions.
computation: Sum duration for player_possession events where speed_avg_band is hsr or sprinting.
interpretation: Higher value suggests sustained fast play with the ball.

definition: Count of build-up possessions that move forward.
computation: Count build_up player_possession events where x_end minus x_start is positive.
interpretation: Higher value suggests build-up that advances the ball rather than only recycling.

definition: Total forward distance gained during build-up.
computation: Sum positive x_end - x_start for build_up player_possession events.
interpretation: Higher value suggests stronger progressive buildup.

definition: Count of build-up possessions ending with a pass.
computation: Count build_up player_possession events where end_type is pass.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more passing circulation in buildup.

definition: Count of build-up actions that lead to create phase.
computation: Count build_up player_possession events where lead_to_different_phase is true and next phase is create.
interpretation: Higher value suggests successful progression from buildup into chance-creation structure.

definition: Count of build-up actions that lead to finish phase.
computation: Count build_up player_possession events where lead_to_different_phase is true and next phase is finish.
interpretation: Higher value suggests direct progression from buildup into finishing situations.

definition: Count of pressing engagements.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where event_subtype is pressing.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more aggressive direct pressure.

definition: Count of pressure engagements.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where event_subtype is pressure.
interpretation: Higher value suggests frequent pressure without necessarily pressing as strongly.

definition: Count of counter-press engagements.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where event_subtype is counter_press.
interpretation: Higher value suggests attempts to pressure immediately after losing possession.

definition: Count of recovery-press engagements.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where event_subtype is recovery_press.
interpretation: Higher value suggests chasing or recovering pressure after being bypassed.

definition: Count of engagements that force the opponent backward.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where force_backward is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests pressure that redirects opponent possession away from goal.

definition: Count of engagements that stop possession danger.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where stop_possession_danger is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests defensive actions that cut off dangerous possession situations.

definition: Count of engagements that reduce possession danger.
computation: Count on_ball_engagement events where reduce_possession_danger is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests pressure that weakens opponent attacking threat.

definition: Count of player possessions during set-play phases.
computation: Count player_possession events where phase type is set_play.
interpretation: Higher value suggests more attacking activity from dead-ball situations.

definition: Count of set-play possessions leading to shots.
computation: Count set_play player_possession events where lead_to_shot is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests set-piece shot creation.

definition: Count of set-play possessions leading to goals.
computation: Count set_play player_possession events where lead_to_goal is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests set-piece goal impact.

definition: Count of set-play possessions ending in the penalty area.
computation: Count set_play player_possession events where penalty_area_end is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests dead-ball occupation of dangerous box areas.

definition: Count of non-set-play possessions leading to shots.
computation: Count non-set_play player_possession events where lead_to_shot is true.
interpretation: Higher value suggests open-play shot creation.

definition: Count of passing options starting in wide channels.
computation: Count passing_option events where channel_start is wide_left or wide_right.
interpretation: Higher value suggests wing occupation and flank support.

definition: Count of passing options starting centrally or in half-spaces.
computation: Count passing_option events where channel_start is center or half-space.
interpretation: Higher value suggests central support and half-space occupation.

definition: Count of support off-ball runs.
computation: Count off_ball_run events where event_subtype is support.
interpretation: Higher value suggests nearby support movement for ball circulation.

definition: Count of overlap and underlap runs.
computation: Count off_ball_run events where event_subtype is overlap or underlap.
interpretation: Higher value suggests combination play around wide/half-space lanes.

definition: Count of cross-receiver runs.
computation: Count off_ball_run events where event_subtype is cross_receiver.
interpretation: Higher value suggests attacking movement into crossing targets.

definition: Total pass-ending player possessions inside phases that end with ball loss.
computation: For each phase that contains a possession loss, count pass-ending player possessions and sum across the match-team.
interpretation: Higher value means the team had more passing actions in sequences that eventually ended with a loss.

definition: Count of lost phases that contained six or more pass-ending possessions.
computation: Count possession-loss phases with at least six pass-ending player possessions.
interpretation: Higher value suggests longer passing sequences before eventual loss.
